title: Test Results Container
description: Schema for overall test results document containing multiple test case results

title.description: Title of the test results document

test_date.description: Date and time when tests were executed

test_results.description: Array of test case verification results

platform.description: Platform on which tests were executed

executor.description: Name or identifier of the test executor

total_test_cases.description: Total number of test cases executed

passed_test_cases.description: Number of test cases that passed

failed_test_cases.description: Number of test cases that failed
